creator: julian@current1.whistle.com
text:
someone who is absolutly sure about how signals work, should 
	read the man page for siginterrup (and related calls)
	and make sure it's up-to date. 
	It seems to refer to the current system as BSD4.2

Fix: 

I could just change it and check it in but I think it probably
	requires that someone check the contents a little better
	than I can.
How-To-Repeat: 
	man 3 siginterupt
